blocks.text: Bodø/Glimt stun Inter — Monaco and Benfica hunt their own shocks tonight
Norwegian football at its finest. Bodo/Glimt won at San Siro — now Monaco need one goal to dump PSG out, while Benfica, without suspended Prestianni, chase Real Madrid's slim aggregate lead.
⚽ Sat 16:00 — West Ham visit Anfield as Liverpool's title charge faces scrutiny
⚽ Sat 16:15 — Villarreal at Camp Nou: Barcelona defend their La Liga lead
